headline: GE HealthCare Trial Seeks Manganese MRI Edge With Valuation Upside
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies (NasdaqGS:GEHC) has dosed the first patient in its global LUMINA Phase 2/3 trial of mangaciclanol, a manganese-based MRI contrast agent. The agent has received FDA Fast Track designation, reflecting its potential to address important unmet medical needs in MRI imaging. The LUMINA trial is designed to assess mangaciclanol as a possible alternative to gadolinium-based contrast agents for clinical imaging. For investors, this trial sits at the intersection of medical...
